title: Ofuca USB C to USB C Charger Cable, 60W 2PACK 1M/3FT Type C to Type C Fast Charging USBC Cable Compatible with iPhone 16 15 Pro, Galaxy S24/S23, iPad Pro/Air, MacBook Pro 2020
features: 【Note before purchase】 This is USB-C to USB-C cable, which means it has the same USB C plug on both ends, please be aware that this is not a USB-C to USB-A cable. Besides, you may need a USB C wall charger to charge your device.

【60W C to C Cable Fast Charging】The usbc to usbc cable delivers blazing-fast charging speeds of up to 60W, support PD3.0/QC3.0/QC4.0 fast charging protocols. Perfect for charging your iPhone16/15Pro Max, iPad Pro, or MacBook Air/Pro, Charge your USB-C phone from 0% to 70% in just 30 minutes, or power up your iPad Pro to 50% and MacBook Air to 42% in the same time. With data transfer speeds of up to 480Mbps, you can sync 1200 songs in just one minute!

【High Quality Materials】We only use the highest quality materials for design and production to ensure that there is no short circuit when charging. High quality thermoplastic elastic TPE and PVC material can avoid tangling the wire. The cable keeps up with the latest trend of USB interface. The user-friendly design allows you to plug into all USB Type-C compatible devices without worrying about the orientation of the port.

【Compatible with All USB-C Devices】 The usbc cable is designed to work seamlessly with a wide range of USB-C devices, including iPhone16ProMax/Pro/Plus, 15ProMax/Pro/Plus, Galaxy S25/S24/S23/S22, MacBook Air/Pro 13'', iPad Mini 6, iPad Pro 2021/2020/2018, and iPad Air 2020. Whether you're at home, in the office, or on the go, this cable is your reliable companion for all your charging needs.
【Built to Last】A hard-wearing exterior and a bulletproof fiber core combine to create a cable that can withstand up to 30,000 bends.
description: New USB-C to USB-C Cable Features: brand: OFUCA Length: 3FT/1M×2 Colors: White Charging Technology：60W Interface standard: USB-C to USB-C High-Speed Compatible: Pair up with a 25W wall charger to charge a iphone 16pro to 70% in just 30 minutes. Transfer Files in Seconds: Transfer movies, music, or an entire photo library in seconds with 480Mbps transfer speeds. Compatible Devices: (Limited Charging Speeds): MacBook Pro 16ʺ (2021), MacBook Pro 14ʺ (2021), MacBook Pro (2019/2018/2017/2016) 15.4ʺ, MacBook Pro 2020 16'', Lenovo ThinkPad X1 Series, HP Spectre Series. Galaxy S24+/23+/S22+ Ultra/S22 Ultra Fully Compatible Devices: iPad Pro 2021/2020/2019/2018, iPad Air 4, iPad mini 6, Galaxy S23/S22/S21/S20/S10/S10+/S10e/S8/ S8+/ S9/ S9+/Galaxy Note 20 Ultra/20/10+/10/9/8, MacBook Pro (2020/2019/2018/2017/2016) 13.3ʺ, MacBook Air 2020/2019/2018, Google Pixel 3/4/5/6, Google Nexus 6P, Nintendo Switch, Huawei Matebook X Notes: This is a USB C to USB C Cable, so it does not work with Lightning Port devices, or with USB A Charger. This cable does not support media display.
